description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Packages that runs on pull requests, pushes to main, and published releases. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job with a matrix strategy to build Debian packages for multiple Ubuntu distributions. For each distribution, checkout the code, determine the Launchpad PPA, generate a Debian changelog, build the package, upload it as an artifact, and upload it to Launchpad PPAs based on the GitHub event and reference.
